summary: Iteration 41 - Testing Forgot Password with simulation_code display, Admin Farmer-Agent Assignment, and Registration page field_agent removal. Backend: 16/17 tests passed (1 test failed due to rate limiting - expected security behavior). Frontend: All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/auth/forgot-password correctly returns simulation_code in response for both phone and email identifiers (lines 462-466 in auth.py)
POST /api/auth/reset-password works end-to-end: forgot-password -> verify-reset-code -> reset-password flow validated
GET /api/admin/agents returns list of all 8 agents with cooperative_name and assigned_farmers_count fields
GET /api/admin/all-farmers returns all 43 farmers (coop_members + producteurs) with source type field ('coop_member' or 'user_producteur')
POST /api/admin/assign-farmers-to-agent successfully assigns farmers to agents regardless of cooperative
Admin endpoints correctly require admin user_type - field_agent gets 403 Forbidden
Registration page (/register) correctly shows only 5 user types: producteur, acheteur, entreprise_rse, fournisseur, cooperative - NO field_agent option
Admin Dashboard (/admin) has 'Attribution' button with data-testid='farmer-assignment-btn' navigating to /admin/farmer-assignment
Admin Farmer Assignment page (/admin/farmer-assignment) correctly displays agents list (8 agents), farmers list (43 farmers), search input, and instruction message
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 verified new features: 1) Forgot password flow with simulation_code display works correctly - /api/auth/forgot-password always returns simulation_code field (6 digits) since SMS/email are mocked. The ForgotPassword.jsx page displays this in an amber 'Mode Simulation' box. 2) Admin farmer-agent assignment APIs work: /api/admin/agents (8 agents), /api/admin/all-farmers (43 farmers), /api/admin/assign-farmers-to-agent. The admin can assign any farmer to any agent regardless of cooperative. 3) Registration page correctly removed 'Agent Terrain' (field_agent) from user type options - only 5 options shown. 4) Admin Dashboard has 'Attribution' button navigating to /admin/farmer-assignment page which displays agents, farmers with search functionality.
mocked_api_note: Orange Money, Orange SMS, USSD Gateway, Email Service are MOCKED. simulation_code is returned in forgot-password response since SMS/email delivery is mocked.
